summary: R3/fresh-CI repair after lead gate failure. Fixed desktop renderer packaging so desktop:security-check and desktop:package pass when apps/web/dist is absent in a fresh desktop-only CI job, while preserving the required canary sequence where pnpm build:web runs before pnpm desktop:package and the packaged Electron renderer Dedicated Worker canary matches the Node baseline.

tests_run.result: On test/m2-host-hash-canary with intended canary changes, this R3 handoff, prior QA/R2 message artifacts, and pre-existing lead-owned orchestration file changes still present.

tests_run.command: Remove generated apps/web/dist after verifying the resolved path is inside the workspace

tests_run.result: Fresh-CI absence proof passed with apps/web/dist absent. copy-renderer logged: Skipped optional web renderer assets; D:\WebProjects\MonsoonSovereigns\apps\web\dist does not exist. Electron security preferences passed; preload exposes only monsoonDesktop; renderer file navigation remains restricted to the packaged renderer root; allowed IPC channels remain desktop:getRuntimeInfo and desktop:setFullscreen.

Fresh-CI absence proof passed with apps/web/dist absent. copy-renderer logged the optional web renderer asset skip and packaged main, preload, renderer, and platform adapter artifacts to .tmp/desktop-package/MonsoonSovereigns-win32-x64.
Vite built dist/index.html, dist/host-hash-canary.html, the host-hash-canary worker bundle, and shared assets. Vite emitted only the existing chunk-size warning.

Canary-present package path passed after pnpm build:web. copy-renderer logged: Copied web renderer assets to D:\WebProjects\MonsoonSovereigns\apps\desktop\dist\renderer\web, then packaged desktop artifacts to .tmp/desktop-package/MonsoonSovereigns-win32-x64.
Packaged Electron renderer Dedicated Worker matched the Node baseline: hello hash 61e0ba1c, command/query hash d275faa4, save/load hash 28074edd, save byte length 10920.
Chromium Dedicated Worker matched the Node baseline: hello hash 61e0ba1c, command/query hash d275faa4, save/load hash 28074edd, save byte length 10920.
Root check passed: Prettier format check, ESLint, recursive workspace typecheck, and architecture boundary check all completed successfully.
R3 writer handoff validates against project/schemas/handoff.schema.json.

decisions: Made apps/web/dist an optional generated input for normal desktop packaging; copy-renderer copies it when present and logs an explicit skip when absent.
Kept the required host canary path dependent on the documented sequence: pnpm build:web before pnpm desktop:package, then the packaged Electron canary page is copied into renderer/web.
Did not edit CI workflow files and did not add dependencies.
Kept Electron security unchanged: no Node integration, no broad IPC, and the host hash canary remains gated behind MONSOON_HOST_HASH_CANARY=1.
risks: The packaged Electron host canary is intentionally available only when pnpm build:web has produced apps/web/dist before desktop packaging.
The repo remains dirty in lead-owned orchestration files and QA route/message artifacts that predate this R3 fix.
